docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MONES, FERNANDO MAG MANAGEMENT,INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONES, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LANA AUGUST, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT,INC
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED MAR-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT,INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO MONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LANA AUGUST, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT WITNESSES INCLUDE: SANDRA STEINMETZ, PROPERTY MANAGER, FACILITIES; KIRKOME NETANE, FACILITIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONES, FERNANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT,INC $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-24-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO MONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAG MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LANA AUGUST, PROPERY MANAGER. STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM IS ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN ALLOWS A CONTINUANCE FOR THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
